intake_data.business_type: B2B financial services / small business credit building
intake_data.business_description: TrueBuild Business Credit helps small businesses build corporate credit through a structured 7-step program. The program typically takes 90–120 days and has served over 48,000 businesses since 2001.
intake_data.primary_cta: Start your free business credit analysis
intake_data.content_policy_notes: Do not overstate timelines or guarantee specific scores. Attribution required for all citations. Do not represent TrueBuild as a lender.
intake_data.positioning_statement: The Internet’s longest-standing business credit building program — helping small businesses build corporate credit since 2001.
intake_data.target_audience: Small business owners in the United States seeking to establish or build corporate credit separate from personal credit

review_notes: First controlled demo job. All 10 files generated from TrueBuild audit report data. rss.xml included as placeholder stub (has_rss: false) to support future activation. Reviewer: verify all 10 files present, check positioning language, confirm CTA URL is correct before approving.
_generation_guard: If status is delivered, generator must abort. Never overwrite a delivered job.
